creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #2)

Sorry it took me so long to reply again.

I have since double checked if the error is reproducible for me. QGIS 3.30.3 builds fine for me in both Poudriere and unclean environments.

There is no 'bin/qgis_bench' entry in pkg-plist, nor is there an error that it built but cannot be installed on my system. In fact, I removed 'bin/qgis_bench' from pkg-plist a long time ago because of problems on some systems.

Is your ports tree possibly outdated or patched? Or did you create your own pkg-plist?
